prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, Yuna Mistfell, a masculine guild crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron and brass tool belt, and Yuna Silverbrook, an androgynous guild coordinator in a formal cloak; Yuna Mistfell steadies a shield on the workbench while Yuna Silverbrook guides a safe repair tool, cooperative hands, warm forge light, no sparks, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous forge shot, Yuna Mistfell and Yuna Silverbrook; after ten seconds Yuna Silverbrook taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Yuna Mistfell holds it steady, friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm lighting, no text, no watermark.
